calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Roddick for Mary Yturriaga.

Mr. Roddick addressed the request for extraordinary fees for the Petitioner and for the Attorney. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-22-2014 Continued To Feb-05-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Oct-01-2013 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-01-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-20-2013 Continued To Oct-01-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Robert Roddick to appear on October 1, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Petition for Final Distribution has not been filed. The status hearing was also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Loos. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Continued To Aug-20-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Roddick for Mary Yturriaga (Executor).

Mr. Roddick addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to extraordinary fees. The Court informed Counsel that a request for extraordinary fees are considered in a petition for final distribution. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
